reviews.comment:
Mala atención, perdimos 1 hora de reloj, por cambio de guardia, el agua para el mate te cobran $50 y no te llena ni la mitad del termo..

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, we lost an hour due to a shift change, they charge $50 for water for mate and it doesn't even fill half the thermos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKeXM2SkZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación y buena atención..
No veo bien que cobren el agua para el mate

(Translated by Google)
Very nice station and good service. I don't think it's right that they charge for water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKZ0wtME5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero por la ubicación necesita ser ampliada. El baño de hombres no funcionaba y tuvimos que usar el de discapacitados. YPF necesita invertir más en sus estaciones.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the location makes it need to be expanded. The men's restroom was out of order, and we had to use the accessible one. YPF needs to invest more in its stations.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias ! Nos interesa su opinión para mejorar ! Saludos
